'''âdh-n-zh''' ('''kadhanazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbowel|imbowel]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbowel|imbowel]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âdh-n-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kadhanazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhanazh|thidhanazh]] || [[word:jidhanazh|jidhanazh]] || [[word:shidhanazh|shidhanazh]] || [[word:kidhanazh|kidhanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhanazh|thuthudhanazh]] || [[word:jujudhanazh|jujudhanazh]] || [[word:shushudhanazh|shushudhanazh]] || [[word:kukudhanazh|kukudhanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhanazh|thudhanazh]] || [[word:judhanazh|judhanazh]] || [[word:shudhanazh|shudhanazh]] || [[word:kudhanazh|kudhanazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhanazh|thudhanazh]] || [[word:judhanazh|judhanazh]] || [[word:shudhanazh|shudhanazh]] || [[word:kudhanazh|kudhanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhanazh|thedhanazh]] || [[word:jedhanazh|jedhanazh]] || [[word:shedhanazh|shedhanazh]] || [[word:kedhanazh|kedhanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhanazh|thothodhanazh]] || [[word:jojodhanazh|jojodhanazh]] || [[word:shoshodhanazh|shoshodhanazh]] || [[word:kokodhanazh|kokodhanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhanazh|thodhanazh]] || [[word:jodhanazh|jodhanazh]] || [[word:shodhanazh|shodhanazh]] || [[word:kodhanazh|kodhanazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhanazh|thodhanazh]] || [[word:jodhanazh|jodhanazh]] || [[word:shodhanazh|shodhanazh]] || [[word:kodhanazh|kodhanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdhanazh|thĂŠdhanazh]] || [[word:jĂŠdhanazh|jĂŠdhanazh]] || [[word:shĂŠdhanazh|shĂŠdhanazh]] || [[word:kĂŠdhanazh|kĂŠdhanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhanazh|thathadhanazh]] || [[word:jajadhanazh|jajadhanazh]] || [[word:shashadhanazh|shashadhanazh]] || [[word:kakadhanazh|kakadhanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhanazh|thadhanazh]] || [[word:jadhanazh|jadhanazh]] || [[word:shadhanazh|shadhanazh]] || [[word:kadhanazh|kadhanazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhanazh|thadhanazh]] || [[word:jadhanazh|jadhanazh]] || [[word:shadhanazh|shadhanazh]] || [[word:kadhanazh|kadhanazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhanazh|shadhanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhanazh|goshadhanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhanazh|gokishadhanazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhanazhnĂŒ|shadhanazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnknĂŒ|goshadhanazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhnĂŒ|gokishadhanazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhanazhshĂ«|shadhanazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkshĂ«|goshadhanazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhshĂ«|gokishadhanazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhanazhro|shadhanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkro|goshadhanazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhro|gokishadhanazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhanazhmu|shadhanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkmu|goshadhanazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhmu|gokishadhanazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhanazhsher|shadhanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnksher|goshadhanazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhsher|gokishadhanazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhanazhng|shadhanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkng|goshadhanazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhng|gokishadhanazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhanazhya|shadhanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkya|goshadhanazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhya|gokishadhanazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhanazhyam|shadhanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkyam|goshadhanazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhyam|gokishadhanazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhanazhnĂŒshĂ«|shadhanazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadhanazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadhanazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhanazhnĂŒro|shadhanazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnknĂŒro|goshadhanazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhnĂŒro|gokishadhanazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhanazhnĂŒmu|shadhanazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnknĂŒmu|goshadhanazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhnĂŒmu|gokishadhanazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhanazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shadhanazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadhanazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadhanazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhanazhshĂ«ro|shadhanazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkshĂ«ro|goshadhanazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhshĂ«ro|gokishadhanazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhanazhshĂ«mu|shadhanazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkshĂ«mu|goshadhanazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhshĂ«mu|gokishadhanazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhanazhronĂŒ|shadhanazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkronĂŒ|goshadhanazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhronĂŒ|gokishadhanazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhanazhroshĂ«|shadhanazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkroshĂ«|goshadhanazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhroshĂ«|gokishadhanazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhanazhromu|shadhanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkromu|goshadhanazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhromu|gokishadhanazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhanazhmunĂŒ|shadhanazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkmunĂŒ|goshadhanazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhmunĂŒ|gokishadhanazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhanazhmushĂ«|shadhanazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkmushĂ«|goshadhanazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhmushĂ«|gokishadhanazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhanazhmuro|shadhanazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhanazhnkmuro|goshadhanazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhanazhmuro|gokishadhanazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
